justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences, including the initial ambiguous request.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete options or suggesting a different approach until very late in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved many unnecessary turns as the agent repeatedly checked for the same unavailable 9 AM slot without proactively suggesting alternative times or strategies earlier.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of the agent's responses and its inability to proactively find an available slot, leading to many unproductive turns.

overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of checking for 9 AM slots, which were consistently unavailable, and did not effectively pivot to suggesting alternative times or a broader search until the very end of the conversation.
